curation.planner_notes: Use the zero-empires trick to avoid interference. Set end-game year as late as possible. Conquer the Hive FE and terraform their worlds.
known_limitations: The current save parser reads origin but does not yet track terraforming of specific world types or Shattered Fragments count.

source.name: Flesh Adapts
source.description: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge while using biological ships.
source.requirement: Defeat the Prethoryn Scourge as an empire with a biological shipset.
source.hint: Like all crises, lowering the Crisis Strength setting to 0.25x makes this a lot easier to achieve.

conditions.notes: Requires Beastmasters civic (or other means of biological shipset — verification needed).
This achievement requires the BioGenesis DLC.
Requires the Prethoryn Scourge crisis.

warnings: Requires the endgame crisis to be the Prethoryn Scourge — force in galaxy settings if possible.
Biological shipset access may require specific civics or origin choices.
curation.planner_notes: Force Prethoryn as the endgame crisis. Build a biological shipset fleet. Set crisis strength to 0.25x for easier defeat.
known_limitations: The current save parser reads civics but does not yet identify crisis type or biological shipset usage.

source.name: King of Monsters
source.description: As a Behemoth Fury empire, become the undisputed apex predator of the galaxy.
source.requirement: Win the game via the Behemoth Fury crisis path.
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick to complete the achievement at your leisure.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the BioGenesis DLC.
Requires completing the Behemoth Fury crisis path.

warnings: The Behemoth Fury crisis path requires specific origin/empire setup from BioGenesis content.
curation.planner_notes: Use the zero-empire trick to complete the crisis path without interference.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect crisis path stages or Behemoth Fury completion.

source.name: Made a Friend Today
source.description: Form a Covenant with any Patron
source.requirement: Form a Covenant
source.hint: Playing with the Endbringers origin will guarantee a Covenant with the End of the Cycle.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
Must form a Covenant with any Patron (major or minor).

curation.planner_notes: Very easy. The Endbringers origin guarantees a Covenant with the End of the Cycle. Alternatively, any empire with psionic access can encounter minor patrons in the Shroud. Simply accept the first Covenant offer.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect Covenant formation or patron type.

source.name: Mildly Possessed
source.description: Discover every available minor and major Patron in a single game
source.requirement: Establish communications with all 8 patrons available in a game
source.hint: Empires with the Shroud-Forged origin who choose to support the Shroud during their situation will start in contact with the Animator of Clay.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.

warnings: Not all 8 patrons may be available in a single game depending on galaxy conditions.
Some patrons require specific trigger conditions to appear.
Highly RNG-dependent — may require multiple attempts.
curation.planner_notes: Shroud-Forged origin that supports the Shroud starts in contact with the Animator of Clay, reducing the total to 7 remaining. The 8 patrons include both major (Eater of Worlds, Instrument of Desire, End of the Cycle) and minor patrons. Deep Shroud diving and multiple covenant offers are needed to encounter all available patrons. Because available patrons vary by game conditions, this achievement may be easier with Shroud-Forged or Endbringers origin.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect which patrons have been encountered or are available.

source.name: Master of Puppets
source.description: While playing with the Secret Societies civic, have 5 or more empires in a Proxy War simultaneously
source.requirement: Instigate a Proxy War involving 5+ empires as an empire with a Secret Societies civic
source.hint: Build Spy Networks on all your neighbors.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
Must have the Secret Societies civic.
The Proxy War must involve 5 or more empires simultaneously.

warnings: Requires a dense galaxy with enough empires to draw 5+ into one Proxy War.
Building Spy Networks is essential; assets and infiltration level affect the operation.
curation.planner_notes: Take the Secret Societies civic. Build Spy Networks on all neighbours. Use the Instigate Proxy War operation, targeting a region with many empires to involve as many as possible. Higher intel and assets improve success chance.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect Proxy War involvement counts.

source.name: Master of the Shroud
source.description: Gain a Covenant Power from each Patron when forging your own path
source.requirement: Have the "Psionic Mastery" modifier
source.hint: When the option to form a Covenant is given, choose to forge your own path.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
When offered a Covenant in the Shroud, must choose to forge your own path instead. This grants the Psionic Mastery modifier.

warnings: Once you forge your own path, you cannot accept any Covenant in that game.
Requires psionic ascension to access the Shroud and receive Covenant offers.
curation.planner_notes: Achieve psionic ascension. Enter the Shroud until offered a Covenant. Instead of accepting, choose the option to forge your own path. This grants the Psionic Mastery modifier. The Endbringers origin forces an End of the Cycle offer — declining it to forge your own path still counts.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect the Psionic Mastery modifier or Shroud path choices.

source.name: Mind Over Metal
source.description: Unlock every Psionic Ship Component
source.requirement: Unlock the following technologies: Precognition Interface, Psi Jump Drives, Psionic Shields, Zro Launchers, Psionic Bombers, Psionic Disruptors, Psionic Lightning and Psi-Phase Generators
source.hint: The Shroudwalkers can be paid every 10 years to give a special project to gain one of the missing techs.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
Requires unlocking all 8 psionic ship component technologies.

warnings: Some psionic techs require Zro as a strategic resource.
Tech draw RNG may delay specific component research options.
The Shroudwalkers enclave can provide missing techs via special projects every 10 years.
curation.planner_notes: Pursue psionic ascension for access to psionic techs. The Shroudwalkers (available with Shadows of the Shroud DLC) can be paid every 10 years to give a special project that unlocks a missing psionic component tech. Secure a Zro source for the later component techs.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot count unlocked psionic component technologies.

source.name: This Is the Part Where We Kill You
source.description: Lose >999 Pops when completing the Experimental Testing Situation
source.requirement: Spend 1000+ pops at once in an Experimental Testing situation
source.hint: This situation is available for empires with the Experimental Sentencing or Judicial R&D civic.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
Experimental Sentencing or Judicial R&D civic

warnings: Requires 1000+ pops to be available to spend at once — this is a very large population even for a mature empire.
The Experimental Testing situation will consume the pops permanently.
Pop growth speed and immigration must be maximised well before triggering.
curation.planner_notes: Take Experimental Sentencing or Judicial R&D civic. Build a very large population (1000+ pops) through conquest, pop assembly, and migration. When ready, start the Experimental Testing situation and choose the option to spend 1000+ pops. The pops are consumed, so time this when you can afford the loss.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect Experimental Testing situation state or pop consumption.

source.name: The End
source.description: Destroy the galaxy with the Aura of the End
source.requirement: Form a Covenant with the End of the Cycle and destroy the galaxy
source.hint: This is achieved by covering every system in the galaxy with the Aura of the End before the Reckoning is triggered.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Shadows of the Shroud DLC.
Must form a Covenant with the End of the Cycle patron.

warnings: The End of the Cycle is one of the major patrons and may not appear in every game without the Endbringers origin.
The Aura of the End must cover every system in the galaxy before the Reckoning triggers.
The Reckoning event triggers on a timer and cannot be stopped once started.
If the Reckoning fires before the Aura covers the galaxy, the achievement fails.
curation.planner_notes: Extremely difficult. Use the Endbringers origin for a guaranteed End of the Cycle Covenant offer. After forming the Covenant, the Aura of the End spreads from your capital. Expand it aggressively to cover every system before the Reckoning timer expires. Small galaxy sizes reduce the number of systems to cover.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect covenant type or Aura of the End coverage state.

source.name: Cosmic Confetti
source.description: Watch your Red Giant home star blow up
source.requirement: Red Giant Expansion situation progresses completely
source.hint: Play as an empire with the Red Giant origin and wait for the Red Giant Expansion situation to progress completely.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals DLC.
Must start with the Red Giant origin.

warnings: The Red Giant Expansion situation progresses automatically but takes time.
Your home system is destroyed when the situation completes.
curation.planner_notes: Very easy. Start as a Red Giant origin empire. The Red Giant Expansion situation will auto-progress. Wait for it to complete and watch your home star explode. Colonise other planets before completion since your homeworld is destroyed.
known_limitations: The current save parser cannot detect the Red Giant Expansion situation progress or completion.

source.name: From Bad to Worse
source.description: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
source.requirement: Use 5 Blazing Scourge decisions on a Tomb World
source.hint: The Blazing Scourge decision requires the Fire Cult civic.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals DLC.
The Blazing Scourge decision requires the Fire Cult civic.
Requires using the Blazing Scourge decision at least 5 times on a Tomb World.

warnings: Requires the Fire Cult civic, which locks the empire into specific ethics and gameplay.
curation.planner_notes: Start with the Fire Cult civic. Find a Tomb World (common from the Sol system or event outcomes) and use the Blazing Scourge planetary decision 5 times.
known_limitations: The current save parser reads civics but does not yet track planetary decision usage.

source.name: Summer Vacation
source.description: Create a Volcanic Resort World
source.requirement: Have a Resort World on a Volcanic World
source.hint: Start on a Volcanic World with guaranteed habitable worlds turned on.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals expansion.
Requires a Volcanic World planet.
Requires designating the planet as a Resort World.

warnings: The planet must both be Volcanic class and have the Resort World designation.
curation.planner_notes: Start on a Volcanic World with guaranteed habitable worlds turned on. Colonize the Volcanic world and use the planet decision to make it a Resort World.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet read planet class or designation.

source.name: Volcanic Empire
source.description: Terraform 10 planets to Volcanic world (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
source.requirement: Terraform 10 owned planets to Volcanic World before a Galactic Firestorm victory
source.hint: Set habitable planets to 5x and start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals expansion.
Requires terraforming at least 10 owned planets to Volcanic before a Galactic Firestorm victory.
The terraforming must be completed before the Galactic Firestorm victory (the Infernals crisis path end).

warnings: Time-limited by the Galactic Firestorm victory condition; delaying victory allows more terraforming.
curation.planner_notes: Start with Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic and set habitable planets to 5x. Prioritize the Volcanic Terraforming technologies and terraform planets systematically before completing the crisis path.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect terraforming outcomes by planet class or track crisis completion state for Infernals.

source.name: Blazing Domain
source.description: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants (Before Galactic Firestorm victory)
source.requirement: Terraform 100 stars to Red Giants before a Galactic Firestorm victory
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals expansion.
Requires terraforming at least 100 stars into Red Giants before a Galactic Firestorm victory.
The star terraforming must be completed before the Galactic Firestorm victory.

warnings: Requires 100 star terraforming operations before the crisis victory; time management is critical.
curation.planner_notes: Use the zero-empires trick to avoid interference. Focus on star terraforming technologies and allocate resources to continually convert stars as soon as cooldowns permit.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet track star terraforming operations or the Infernals crisis path state.

source.name: Galactic Firestorm
source.description: Win the game through the Hyperthermia Crisis Path
source.requirement: Win the game through the Galactic Hyperthermia crisis path
source.hint: Use the zero empires trick.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals DLC.
Requires completing the Galactic Hyperthermia crisis path.

curation.planner_notes: Use the zero-empire trick for an easier path to victory.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect Hyperthermia crisis path stages.

source.name: Burning Heaven
source.description: Create a Volcanic Holy World
source.requirement: Terraform an owned Holy World to a Volcanic World.
source.hint: Start with the Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Infernals expansion.
Requires terraforming an owned Holy World into a Volcanic World.

warnings: Holy Worlds are rare and guarded by Fallen Empires. Owning one requires conquering or inheriting it from a Fallen Empire that spawns with one.
curation.planner_notes: Start with Planet Forgers or Planetary Architects civic. Find a Fallen Empire with a Holy World, conquer it, and terraform it to Volcanic.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect planet class changes or interaction with Fallen Empire-owned worlds.

source.name: Khan of Khans
source.description: Seize back your throne and have at least 5 Satrapy Vassals.
source.requirement: As Heirs of the Khan origin, reclaim the throne and have at least 5 Satrapy vassals.
source.hint: Start as Heirs of the Khan; focus on subjugating other empires as Satrapies to reach 5 Satrapy vassals.

conditions.notes: Requires the Heirs of the Khan origin.
This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.
Requires at least 5 vassals (Satrapy type preferred but unverifiable).

warnings: The achievement requires Satrapy-type vassals, not generic vassals — the satrapy agreement type is not currently parseable.
The Khan-title reclaim flag is not currently parseable.
curation.planner_notes: Heirs of the Khan start with a vassal; focus on subjugation wars until you have 5 Satrapy vassals, then reclaim the throne via the relevant decision.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet distinguish Satrapy vassal agreements from other subject types.
The Khan-title reclaim state flag is not parseable.

source.name: Forever is a Long Time
source.description: Survive for at least 200 years and reach the End Game Crisis.
source.requirement: As Forever Cruise origin, survive 200+ years and the End Game Crisis must begin.
source.hint: The Forever Cruise origin has mechanics to manage passenger satisfaction across long playtimes.

conditions.notes: Requires the Forever Cruise origin.
This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.

warnings: 200-year survival and endgame crisis trigger requirements are only partially trackable.
curation.planner_notes: Pick Forever Cruise origin. Manage passenger satisfaction through mechanics; the 200-year and crisis requirements resolve naturally with time if the empire survives.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet track years survived or endgame crisis start state.
The forfeit/abandonment flag is not parseable.

source.name: The Long Way Round
source.description: Complete the pilgrimage to all seven Sacred Sites.
source.requirement: As Sacred Path origin, visit and complete all seven sacred sites.
source.hint: Sacred sites are marked on the galaxy map for Sacred Path empires; prioritize exploration toward them.

conditions.notes: Requires the Sacred Path origin.
This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.

curation.planner_notes: Sacred Path starts with pilgrimage markers on the galaxy map. Explore toward each sacred site — the completion flag fires per site.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet parse sacred-site pilgrimage completion flags.

source.name: Take My Energy
source.description: Cook a homeworld with a Stellar Cannon.
source.requirement: Use the Stellar Cannon megastructure to fire upon and devastate a homeworld.
source.hint: Build the Stellar Cannon (requires megastructure tech) and target any empire capital world.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.

curation.planner_notes: Build the Stellar Cannon (megastructure) and fire it at an enemy homeworld. Requires megastructure engineering tech and a rival empire with a capital planet in range.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect the fired_dyson_gun_at_homeworld flag.
Stellar Cannon build completion is not currently parseable.

source.name: So Long, and Thanks for All the Fish
source.description: Embark when your homeworld is at 70% devastation.
source.requirement: Embark your empire (become nomadic) while your homeworld has at least 70% devastation.
source.hint: Damage your own homeworld via events or war devastation; then use the Embark decision.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.

curation.planner_notes: Damage your homeworld to 70% devastation (e.g., through events, orbital bombardment in a defensive war), then use the Embark decision to become nomadic.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect the embarked_from_devastated_homeworld flag.
Devastation tracking is not currently implemented.

source.name: I Win Longest Road!
source.description: Connect 2 Capital Planets with a Wayline that is at least 20 Waystations long.
source.requirement: Build a Wayline between two capital planets with 20+ Waystations in the chain.
source.hint: As a Nomadic empire, construct Waystations across the galaxy to form a long chain between capitals.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.
Weak proxy — owning at least 20 starbases suggests the infrastructure for a long Wayline chain.

warnings: The starbase_count >= 20 is a weak proxy for 20+ Waystations; actual waystation network topology and inter-capital routing are not machine-trackable.
curation.planner_notes: As a Nomadic empire, build Waystations across the galaxy to form a chain connecting two capital planets. The 20-Waystation minimum requires significant territory and infrastructure.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet parse Waystation network topology or distinguish Waystation starbases from others.
The inter-capital routing condition is not parseable.

source.name: It's Full of Stars
source.description: Settle on Europa as your Empire Capital.
source.requirement: As a Nomadic empire, settle on the planet Europa (Sol system) as your capital.
source.hint: Find Sol (Earth's system), settle Europa, and make it your capital. Sol may not spawn in every galaxy.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.

warnings: Sol system may not spawn in every galaxy — partial RNG gate.
curation.planner_notes: Find the Sol system, settle Europa, and make it your empire capital. Since Sol is not guaranteed to exist in every galaxy, this may require multiple starts or modded galaxy generation settings.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet detect the cross-entity carrier/system flags required for exact tracking.

source.name: Defenders of the Galaxy
source.description: Defeat all End Game Crises before abdicating as Defender of the Galaxy without any non-Arkship colonies.
source.requirement: As Defender of the Galaxy (Ambition path), defeat all endgame crises without ever having non-Arkship colonies.
source.hint: Remain nomadic (no settled colonies) through the entire game; defeat Prethoryn, Unbidden, and Contingency.

conditions.notes: This achievement requires the Nomads DLC.
Requires defeating all endgame crises (Prethoryn, Unbidden, Contingency).

warnings: Requires defeating ALL endgame crises in a single playthrough — a multi-crisis galaxy setting is strongly recommended.
The no-non-Arkship-colonies restriction is not currently machine-trackable.
curation.planner_notes: Pick the Defender of the Galaxy ambition. You must defeat all three endgame crises without ever building a non-Arkship colony. Enable multiple crises in galaxy settings for a practical attempt.
known_limitations: The current save parser does not yet track all-crises-defeated state or distinguish crisis types defeated.
Colony ship origin tracking (ark vs. standard colony ship) is not implemented.
The current save parser does not yet track the abdication status for the Defender of the Galaxy ambition.
